description_long: This is a coordinated set of dark brown leather furniture, consisting of a two-seater sofa, two matching armchairs, and a square ottoman. The pieces feature a boxy, modern silhouette with straight lines and prominent, thick armrests. The upholstery is tufted with deep buttons on the seat and back surfaces, giving a classic, luxurious appearance. The armrests and backrests are of equal height, creating a uniform, enclosed look. The legs are short, blocky, and barely visible, suggesting a sturdy and grounded design. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with the leather reflecting light subtly across its surface.
description: A dark brown, tufted leather sofa set with two armchairs and a matching ottoman, featuring boxy shapes and thick, uniform armrests. The upholstery is glossy and deeply button-tufted, giving a classic, luxurious look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set: two-seater sofa at the back, two armchairs on either side, and the ottoman centered in front.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the sofa and armchairs, with the ottoman in the middle foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels of the sofa and armchairs, with the ottoman in front.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the side and back of the sofa and armchairs, with the ottoman between them.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each seat features a single, attached, deeply button-tufted cushion for both the seat and backrest, with uniform size and arrangement across all pieces.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, thick, and straight, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, padded profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible, likely made of wood or plastic, and finished in a dark color to blend with the upholstery.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrests are straight, of medium height, continuous across each piece, and feature deep button tufting matching the seat cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid dark brown leather with a glossy finish and a prominent button-tufted pattern on all seating surfaces.
